name: RIR Autoregulation
description: Prescribe a target reps-in-reserve rather than a fixed load. Adjust load each session so the last set lands at the target RIR, and progress by lowering target RIR across a mesocycle (e.g. 3 RIR early to 0-1 RIR late) and/or adding load as strength rises.
trigger: Actual RIR drifts above target (too easy) -> add load; below target (too hard) -> hold or reduce
increment: Load adjusted to hit target RIR; target RIR reduced ~1 rep per 1-2 weeks across the block
